default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly kickoff and calendar review to align on priorities and optimize scheduling.](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel needs more deep work time, especially Monday mornings; kickoffs moving to 11am or later](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Transition plan: Kyle to own more sales/onboarding meetings; Marcel optional attendee](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Calendar restructure needed: block mornings, cluster meetings, balance deep work days](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Follow-ups: Webinar status, Nav invoice issue, podcast scheduling, recruiter responses](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

## Topics

### Personal Updates

  - [Alice's son Jabin turned 3; weekend birthday party](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Bridget had a relaxing family weekend](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Marcel recently returned to gym routine, sparking ideas](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Calendar Optimization

  - [Marcel needs uninterrupted deep work time, especially Monday mornings](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Current schedule: No strategic thinking time until Friday](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Solution: Block mornings until 11am, move kickoffs to 11am or later](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Aim for 1 full meeting day + 1 afternoon/week, leaving other mornings open](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [2-4pm generally open for meetings; consider East Coast timing](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Office day (Tuesday) impacts schedule; potential to shift for better balance](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Meeting Ownership Transition

  - [Kyle to increasingly own sales/onboarding meetings](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Marcel to remain optional attendee, joining briefly when needed](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Goal: Kyle fully managing sales meetings in \~1 month](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Webinar Status Uncertainty

  - [Tiago declined event; lack of preparation noted](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Action: Bridget to inquire with Kyle/Jimmy; discuss in account review](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

### Nav Invoice Issue

  - [$40k/month account facing invoice questions](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=40000.0)
  - [Need for "white glove" treatment given high-value contract](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=40000.0)
  - [Action: Flag to Kyle for follow-up with Nav team](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Podcast Opportunity

  - [Ahrefs podcast (comparable to Animalz) reached out](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Schedule 2-3 weeks out, offering afternoon time slots](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget: Move kickoff meetings to 11am or later](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Bridget: Block Marcel's calendar until 11am for deep work](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Bridget: Inquire about webinar status with Kyle/Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Marcel: Review and respond to recruiter emails](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Alice: Schedule Ahrefs podcast for 2-3 weeks out, afternoon slots](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
  - [Team: Revisit calendar structure in \~3 weeks for major reorganization](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Kyle: Follow up on Nav invoice issue](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Marcel: Prepare for potential involvement in high-context account issues](https://fathom.video/share/MK8cHqfT_yKgyzG48f-B1dyqr-EDS3yZ?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

action_items.description: Slack Kyle/Jimmy re: webinar status (Tiago declined)
Move kickoff meeting to 11 AM or later; block Marcel's calendar until 11 AM on Mondays for deep work
Revisit overall calendar structure w/ Marcel; plan 1 full meeting day + 1 afternoon/week
Inform Bruno to handle Automate meeting
Copy-paste recruiter follow-up from Bridget's email
Schedule podcast interview for Marcel (A trefs) - offer afternoon slots few weeks out
